name: Feud Angle
description: Storyline developments that drive ongoing rivalries and generate dramatic twists

entries.templateText: FAVORED hits UNDERDOG with a steel chair during a tag team match, shattering their alliance in front of a stunned arena.
FAVORED leaves UNDERDOG alone in the ring to be systematically destroyed by a rival stable, walking up the ramp with a smirk.
FAVORED grabs a microphone and reveals they only teamed with UNDERDOG to keep them away from the championship picture.
During a victory celebration, FAVORED blindsides UNDERDOG, hitting their finisher and throwing their merchandise into the crowd.
FAVORED secretly cuts a deal behind the back of UNDERDOG, resulting in UNDERDOG losing their contract or title opportunity.
FAVORED targets the previously injured limb of UNDERDOG during what was supposed to be a friendly exhibition match.
UNDERDOG extends a hand in mutual respect, but FAVORED spits in their face and delivers a low blow.
FAVORED takes a bribe from a rival faction to completely eliminate UNDERDOG from an upcoming high-stakes battle royal.
FAVORED convinces the tag team partner of UNDERDOG to turn on them, leaving UNDERDOG completely isolated in the locker room.
FAVORED reveals they have been the anonymous mastermind behind the recent string of backstage attacks on UNDERDOG.
FAVORED saves UNDERDOG from a brutal post-match beatdown, shocking the crowd and signaling an unexpected alliance.
UNDERDOG offers an alliance to FAVORED against a common enemy, and FAVORED reluctantly nods, sealing it with a tense handshake.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG find themselves forced to team up by management, discovering an eerie, high-impact chemical synergy in the ring.
FAVORED clears the ring to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with UNDERDOG as an invading faction tries to take over the show.
FAVORED buys out the contract of an indy standout, establishing a powerful new mentorship alliance over UNDERDOG.
FAVORED steps into the line of fire to take a weapon shot meant for UNDERDOG, establishing a powerful baseline of trust.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG exchange a silent, respectful look after surviving a brutal multi-man ladder match together.
FAVORED rescues the family member of UNDERDOG from an aggressive backstage interview, earning unexpected gratitude.
FAVORED invites UNDERDOG into their exclusive inner circle, offering them a level of protection they desperately need.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG cut a joint promo, vowing to put aside their historic blood feud to clean up a corrupt locker room.
FAVORED makes deeply personal comments regarding the legendary wrestling family of UNDERDOG, calling them a disgrace to the legacy.
FAVORED targets the real-life physical limitations or age of UNDERDOG, mocking their dream of one last championship run.
FAVORED defaces a historic trophy or championship belt belonging to UNDERDOG, throwing it into a trash can live on television.
FAVORED brings up an embarrassing, untelevised training incident from years ago to completely humiliate UNDERDOG.
FAVORED targets the hometown crowd of UNDERDOG, insulting their way of life to draw a massive visceral reaction from the audience.
FAVORED breaks into the private locker room of UNDERDOG, destroying their personal belongings and leaving a threatening note.
FAVORED interrupts a heartfelt retirement tribute or hall of fame announcement for UNDERDOG with mocking laughter.
FAVORED claims that UNDERDOG only got their job due to backstage politics and nepotism rather than actual talent.
FAVORED corners the real-life spouse or partner of UNDERDOG at ringside, using them as a human shield during a tense confrontation.
FAVORED tracks down UNDERDOG at a local gym or training facility, turning a private workout into a highly personal brawl.
FAVORED ambushes UNDERDOG in the parking lot, throwing them into the side of a production truck before security can intervene.
FAVORED attacks UNDERDOG from behind during their entrance, hitting a devastating suplex directly onto the cold steel ramp.
FAVORED uses a hidden foreign object to blindside UNDERDOG during a commercial break, leaving them bleeding in the center of the ring.
FAVORED attacks UNDERDOG with a heavy camera tripod during a routine backstage interview segment.
FAVORED pulls the referee in front of a spear from UNDERDOG, then uses the chaos to deliver a brutal, unpunished low blow.
FAVORED traps the ankle of UNDERDOG inside a folding steel chair and leaps off the second rope, looking to break the limb.
FAVORED puts UNDERDOG through the announcer's table with a high-flying driving maneuver after the closing bell has already rung.
FAVORED chokes out UNDERDOG using a stray television cable until locker room officials storm the ring to pull them away.
FAVORED hides among the arena security staff, revealing themselves at the last second to initiate a fierce, unexpected beatdown on UNDERDOG.
FAVORED attacks UNDERDOG in the catering area, throwing them through a heavily laden table in front of horrified locker room peers.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG are separated by a massive wall of thirty security guards before a single physical blow can be landed.
FAVORED exits the ring and walks away from a tense confrontation, completely ignoring the heated challenges of UNDERDOG.
An elder statesman of the business steps in to mediate a brewing locker room war between FAVORED and UNDERDOG.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG agree to a temporary truce to ensure their upcoming high-profile multi-man match isn't completely ruined.
A massive pull-apart brawl between FAVORED and UNDERDOG ends with both men cooling down in separate local law enforcement holding cells.
FAVORED offers a public, corporate apology to UNDERDOG under intense pressure from the promotion's legal department.
UNDERDOG tries to ambush FAVORED, but FAVORED anticipates the move, slipping out the side door just in time.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG sign a strict, legally binding contract prohibiting them from touching each other until the scheduled pay-per-view.
A technical glitch or arena power outage cuts off a highly volatile ring confrontation between FAVORED and UNDERDOG.
FAVORED chooses to pay a hefty financial fine to management rather than face UNDERDOG in an unsanctioned street fight tonight.
FAVORED uses an exclusive contract loophole to strip UNDERDOG of their number one contender status.
FAVORED hires a high-priced corporate legal team to file a restraining order against UNDERDOG, barring them from the building.
FAVORED forces UNDERDOG to sign a humiliating contract stipulating that if UNDERDOG loses, they must leave the territory forever.
FAVORED buys out the lucrative merchandise rights of UNDERDOG, effectively controlling all of their career revenue streams.
FAVORED offers UNDERDOG a massive, life-changing sum of cash to simply lay down and throw their upcoming title match.
FAVORED orchestrates a complex corporate buyout of the training school where UNDERDOG originally learned the wrestling business.
FAVORED leverages a private bounty contract, offering cash to any wrestler who can successfully take out UNDERDOG.
FAVORED manipulates the official rules, adding a highly dangerous, career-threatening stipulation to their match with UNDERDOG.
FAVORED holds the active contract of UNDERDOG over their head, forcing them to act as a personal, subservient locker room servant.
FAVORED uses political leverage with TV executives to cut off the live broadcast signal right as UNDERDOG begins an explosive exposé.
FAVORED rejects the cheers of the crowd, kicking a fan's sign and declaring that the audience is completely unworthy of their talent.
FAVORED undergoes a profound crisis of conscience, refusing to use a steel chair offered by a corrupt manager to finish a match.
FAVORED adopts a completely new, sinister, dark persona, abandoning all previous moral codes to achieve victory.
FAVORED snaps after a frustrating loss, laying out the referee and local ringside staff in an unhinged, violent breakdown.
FAVORED cuts a deeply emotional promo about sacrificing their family life for the business, showing a raw, human side.
FAVORED embraces an ultra-patriotic or localized persona, instantly cementing themselves as a massive regional favorite.
FAVORED aligns with an infamous, manipulative manager, selling out their long-held core values for a shot at true gold.
FAVORED breaks down in tears after a hard-fought match, finally earning the true, undying respect of the wrestling locker room.
FAVORED targets a beloved, defenseless veteran trainer backstage, proving they will cross any moral line to get noticed.
FAVORED boldly vacates a secondary title, stating they have completely outgrown it and are moving on to much bigger targets.
The crowd completely hijacks a live in-ring promo by FAVORED, chanting the name of UNDERDOG so loudly that the segment is derailed.
A group of rowdy fans at ringside hands a weapon to UNDERDOG, allowing them to successfully repel an aggressive attack from FAVORED.
FAVORED tries to jump the guardrail to attack a fan, but UNDERDOG storms out of the back to prevent a massive disaster.
The entire live arena audience turns their backs on FAVORED during their entrance, executing a highly organized, eerie silent protest.
Fans throw trash into the ring as FAVORED stands victoriously over a broken, battered, and completely defenseless UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG gets heavily mobbed by enthusiastic fans during a spectacular crowd-surfing entrance, infuriating a watching FAVORED.
FAVORED destroys a handmade sign held by a young fan in the front row, drawing an immediate, intense wave of nuclear heat.
The arena crowd initiates a deafening, stadium-wide standing ovation for UNDERDOG following a deeply heartbreaking, narrow loss.
FAVORED uses a plant in the live audience to trip UNDERDOG during a crucial, high-stakes over-the-top-rope dive.
The crowd organizes a massive, thunderous arena chant that exposes a deeply embarrassing secret regarding the past of FAVORED.
The General Manager forces FAVORED to defend their coveted championship against UNDERDOG in tonight's main event.
FAVORED is caught on a hot mic plotting with the corrupt promotion Commissioner to completely screw UNDERDOG out of a title.
The Authority Figure suspends FAVORED indefinitely for their unchecked, violent backstage conduct against UNDERDOG.
The corporate board strips FAVORED of their executive power, instantly leveling the playing field for a grateful UNDERDOG.
An aggressive Authority Figure bans the signature finishing maneuver of UNDERDOG, heavily favoring FAVORED in their upcoming bout.
The General Manager assigns a highly biased special guest referee to ensure FAVORED retains their title against UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG produces a secret corporate document that completely overrules the unfair match stipulations set by FAVORED.
The Authority Figure forces FAVORED and UNDERDOG to participate in a mandatory, highly tense corporate couples counseling segment.
Management locks FAVORED and UNDERDOG inside a steel cage together, refusing to let them out until a contract is signed.
The promotion's owner personally reverses a corrupt referee decision, awarding a hard-fought, emotional victory back to UNDERDOG.
FAVORED leaks private, highly compromising locker room text messages from UNDERDOG to a major online wrestling dirt sheet.
UNDERDOG posts an explosive, unedited training video on social media, completely exposing the flawed defensive strategy of FAVORED.
FAVORED hijacks a high-profile sports morning talk show, completely trashing the athletic reputation of UNDERDOG on live network TV.
A viral podcaster releases a tell-all audio interview detailing a toxic, long-hidden backstage history between FAVORED and UNDERDOG.
FAVORED cuts an intense, unauthorized live stream promo from the actual front yard of the private home of UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG appears unexpectedly on a rival promotion's broadcast, openly mocking the creative direction and leadership of FAVORED.
FAVORED pays for a massive, highly insulting promotional billboard directly outside the local wrestling school run by UNDERDOG.
A heavily edited, highly damaging hype video package airs, making UNDERDOG look completely foolish while glorifying FAVORED.
FAVORED brings an award-winning mainstream Hollywood celebrity to ringside to completely overshadow the big moment of UNDERDOG.
An anonymous whistleblower sends a massive cache of highly incriminating video files detailing years of cheating by FAVORED directly to UNDERDOG.
